mapper.select: SELECT * FROM store WHERE status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id
SELECT * FROM store WHERE ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT * FROM store WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO store(name, address, phone, status, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{name}, #{address}, #{phone}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE store SET name = #{name}, address = #{address}, phone = #{phone}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE store SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
